change_summary: Universalized build_runtime_identity_block text from named-user local surface to active-user product identity.
Removed named-user recovery key and replaced it with universal voice continuity key parts.
Removed named-user branches from deterministic scolding/hostile-posture regexes.

changed_test_files.coverage: Direct runtime identity block test proves universal product identity and no Taylor/Randall leakage.
Active product law surfaces now include runtime identity and product-code named-user scan.
Actual worker prompt assembly test proves runtime identity enters the live prompt without Taylor/Randall.

unchanged_reference_surface_hashes.note: Runtime identity is still injected through existing non-streaming and streaming prompt assembly paths; tests cover the non-streaming live prompt surface.
